messages.content:
I can help plan or review a load test, but I can’t actually run task 90009 from here.

If you want me to proceed, please provide one of these:
- the load test target/service details,
- the command or script you want run,
- or the expected results/logs you want me to analyze.

If this is meant to modify or execute something in the repo, please submit again with a concrete coding/execution request (or turn off Chat-only mode if that’s enabled).

nextActions.label: Continue chat
nextActions.description: Ask a follow-up question in the same thread.
